title: 3. **xyz.cards API Reseller**
summary:
What it is: A service that resells xyz.cards NFC card SaaS to businesses, offering customized solutions and support. The service will utilize the OpenClaw agent stack to manage client relationships.
Revenue model: The service will charge a markup on top of the standard xyz.cards pricing, with payments collected through Stripe.
Time to first dollar: 2-3 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by researching potential clients and creating a sales pitch for the reseller service.
